title: Unstable Twist
description: A chaotic Minecraft plugin that adds powerful custom weapons inspired by Unstable SMP and Heartless Horizon.
body:
A chaotic Minecraft plugin that adds powerful custom weapons inspired by Unstable SMP and Heartless Horizon.

## Weapons

###  Stab Shot
Creates a massive hole straight down to bedrock.

Command:
```
/givestab
```
###  Nuke Shot
Causes a huge explosion on impact.

Command:
```
/givenuke
```
###  Railgun
An instant-fire crossbow that one-shots anything it hits.

Command:
```
/giverailgun
```
###  Black Hole Mace
Pulls nearby mobs into a 10x10 black hole before exploding.
Command:
```txt
/givemace
```
## Permissions

```txt
unstable.give
```

Only OPs can use the commands.
